creator: vmagerya@gmail.com
text:
Update devel/py-fabric from 1.0.2 to 1.2.2.

Note that Fabric developers support 1.0, 1.1 and 1.2 branches simultaneously, so I'm not completely sure if 1.2 is backward compatible with 1.0 (the changelog [1] does not list any backward incompatible changes between these releases though).

[1] http://docs.fabfile.org/en/1.2.2/changelog.html

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
